title: Careers - MaiStorage

Careers - MaiStorage

Job Seekers
Get Your Dream Job
MaiStorage is built upon Phison’s 24+ years of innovation in NAND controller technology. MaiStorage leverages Phison’s technological expertise
and flexible business model to deliver advanced NAND storage solutions for a range of industries.
Join our team to start your exciting career at MaiStorage!
Featured Openings
Firmware Design Engineer
Maistorage Technology Sdn. Bhd – Puchong, Selangor, Malaysia
We are looking for an experienced firmware engineer to design, install and troubleshoot firmware for Phison products such as USBs, SD cards, eMMCs and UFS controllers.
VIEW DETAILS
AI Engineer
Maistorage Technology Sdn. Bhd – Puchong, Selangor, Malaysia
In this position, you’ll develop, maintain and optimize AI applications using LLMs and RAG technologies as part of a world-class engineering team.
